title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Adapters
intent: Ensure 19_adapters/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. External service adapters, API wrappers, and connectors.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 19_adapters/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 19_adapters/
All module references resolve to existing paths
All local gates (Policy, SoT, QA) pass
No new files created outside of scope_paths_allow
SoT scorecard shows PASS for all defined rules
